title: clinopodium mutabile
intro: Clinopodium mutabile, also known as variable clinopodium, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium mutabile include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe sore throats. Clinopodium mutabile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
